No answer provided

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?stadium ?stadiumLabel ?capacity WHERE {
  ?team wdt:P159 wd:Q11279 ; wdt:P1415 ?stadium .
  ?stadium wdt:P1255 ?capacity .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?stadium rdfs:label ?stadiumLabel
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?capacity)
LIMIT 1
```

Got no rows and 3 columns
